regional_cost_note: Cladding installers in Invercargill typically charge $125–$190/m² for primed pine weatherboard, $105–$170/m² for fibre cement, and $190–$295/m² for brick veneer. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. Weathertightness is critical — use only licensed builders for restricted building work on cladding.
